jack_admin.content:
Frieza is a galactic tyrant and the primary antagonist in the Dragon Ball Z universe. He destroyed Planet Vegeta to prevent the realization of the legendary Super Saiyan prophecy.

Source: dragon_ball_lore.txt - Page 1
Tell me about the Saiyan race.

The Saiyan race is an extraterrestrial species that originates from Planet Vegeta. According to the provided context, their original homeworld was completely destroyed by the galactic tyrant Frieza to prevent the realization of the legendary Super Saiyan prophecy.

Source: dragon_ball_lore.txt - Page 1
